title: Missing Airman Raises Concerns That Iran Could Gain Leverage Over the U.S.
summary_full: Since 1979, Iran has repeatedly used Americans and Europeans detained on its territory to win concessions over more powerful adversaries.
summary_public: Since 1979, Iran has repeatedly used Americans and Europeans detained on its territory to win concessions over more powerful adversaries.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran could Gain Leverage Over the U.S.
